selected.reason: Displays a complete teaching diagram of Model Context Protocol (MCP) with labeled components (LLA, MCP, functions), alongside lecturer commentary, making it a clear, structured visual artifact for course distillation.
Shows a conceptual mind-map with key AI concepts like '大模型基础原理', 'Vibe coding', and 'AI大使访谈', providing context for learning framework and resources, useful for curating course materials.

dropped_summary: Other frames were either partially visible, lacked clear teaching artifacts, or showed overlapping content without new information. Frames with only lecturer faces, blurred areas, or minimal text/diagrams were excluded per criteria.
